verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once upon a time in Bethlehem A King was born to save the soul of men He left his throne and he give his life And love beyond compare cause him die.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Once upon a time at Calvary A perfect sacrifice set men free The forces of evil began to celebrate But Jesus hold them in the grave

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Real love story never end For the hero in the story is coming back again It's no fairy tale for he died for you my friend Real love story never end

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Once upon a time not long ago I was so confused and all along But Jesus give me life beyond measure And real happily ever after
